name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing
reason: Competent national-franchise template — responsive with clear CTAs, but generic corporate typography and a swapped-content template look. Lacks custom premium feel.
note: National franchise — not a real outreach prospect; demo candidate only.

name: Michael & Son
reason: Functional blue corporate multi-trade site with service tabs and testimonials, but generic templated design and flat typography.

name: Zoom Drain
reason: Most polished of the group — strong red hero, good hierarchy — but still a corporate franchise template without distinct brand personality.

name: Plumbline Services
reason: Cluttered layout — badge soup, embedded map, 'TOP 250' logo wall, many competing sections, dated busy feel. Strongest redesign case of the reachable set.
note: Selected as flagship redesign for the demo.

name: Len The Plumber
reason: Bot-blocked. Playwright captured a blank 8 KB page (JS token on grey background). Cannot assess a site I could not load.

name: Roto-Rooter
reason: Preflight 403 — blocks automated browsers. Not screenshotted.
